title: From MCP to Scale: Pipelines That Build Themselves — Rafael Levi, Bright Data
summary: Rafael Levi presents Bright Data's MCP infrastructure for automated web scraping and pipeline maintenance using agents. The system enables agents to inspect sites, generate production scrapers, and self-repair broken collection jobs without human intervention. The approach shifts from manual scraping to autonomous pipeline building and adaptation when site structures change.
